sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the depths of darkness,
I called Your name
When storms surrounded me, You came
Like thunder rolling through the night
Your power showed its mighty might
My fortress strong, my shield divine
In You alone, I'll rest my life

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are my rock, my strength, my all
When mountains shake and kingdoms fall
You lift me up beyond the fight
Your love gives wings to take my flight
(Your love gives wings to take my flight)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The earth beneath began to quake
As heaven's armies came awake
You parted clouds to reach for me
Through lightning flashed across the sea
Your voice echoed through the deep
Your mighty hand, my soul to keep

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Bridge Who can stand against Your might?
Who can dim Your perfect light?
Perfect are Your ways divine
Forever faithful through all time

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: You light my path through darkest night
You train my hands to rise and fight
Your gentleness has made me great
Your mercy sets my spirit straight
From highest peak to deepest vale
Your love and justice never fail

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Final Chorus You are my rock, my strength, my all
When mountains shake and kingdoms fall
You lift me up beyond the fight
Your love gives wings to take my flight
Your love gives wings, Your love gives wings
Your love gives wings to take my flight
